name: sharedserver
description: Manage shared backend processes through the sharedserver CLI. SessionStart attaches via `sharedserver use`; SessionEnd detaches via `sharedserver unuse`, so multiple Claude Code sessions share a single backend that survives session restarts within its grace period.

plugins.name: sharedserver
plugins.description: Generic sharedserver lifecycle for Claude Code: reads ~/.config/claude/sharedserver.json and runs `sharedserver use`/`unuse` per Claude session, sharing one reference-counted backend across sessions.
